message:
test(ftui-extras): improve deadline.rs test coverage (bd-5myuv)

Added 18 new tests (19→37 total) covering:
- SurvivalStats: window_size_zero clamp, survival(negative_t), expected_remaining
  near-zero/positive, identical_samples weibull, EMA convergence
- DeadlineConfig: window_size/min_samples zero clamping, PartialEq
- DeadlineController: default, decide/rationale consistency, new_input/start_validation
  sequences, staleness with multiple inputs, Debug+Clone
- DeadlineDecision/DecisionRationale: Debug+Clone+Eq, past-deadline explanation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
